user.title: DWD UV Index
user.description: Select the DWD forecast station closest to your location. Data is provided by the Deutscher Wetterdienst (DWD) at {url} and updated once daily around 10:00 AM.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the DWD server. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
